ogTitle: Pauls Pocket vs Peachester: Climate Safety

heading: Pauls Pocket vs Peachester — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pauls Pocket, Queensland and Peachester, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pauls Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Peachester (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pauls Pocket or Peachester safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pauls Pocket has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Peachester scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pauls Pocket scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Peachester scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pauls Pocket or Peachester?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pauls Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
